state_pressure.basis: June 16 session overlay — SPX holding above 1.0σ; 10Y near mean; WTI extreme low not driving.

session_context: June 16 session overlay: risk-on emerging; equity leading; medium confidence, fragile stability; WTI extreme low.

drafts.x:
Oil is cratering — and the other signals aren't confirming.
Needs confirmation from the rest of the board — that's when it gets real.

SPX 7,540. 10Y 4.43%. Oil $75.

Invalidation:
• 10Y above 4.58% + SPX loses 7,465
• Oil above $84

What's the signal that tells you this rally is real?
drafts.substack:
REGIME: Risk-on | Confirmed
CONFIDENCE: Medium (56/100)
RISK TILT: pro-risk
STABILITY: Fragile

Snapshot — Jun 16, 2026
  S&P 500:     7,540.15   z +1.11
  10Y Yield:      4.428%  z +0.21
  WTI Oil:        74.95   z -2.87

INSIGHT
S&P 500 at 7,540 is elevated relative to its rolling mean — starting to lean but not decisive. 10Y yield at 4.43% is sitting near its 63-session mean — no signal from yields. Oil at $75 is running well below its 63-session range — oil haven't been this stretched in months. Confidence sits at 56/100 — enough for a directional lean but not a high-conviction call.

INVALIDATION
• 10Y above 4.58% + SPX loses 7,465
• Oil above $84

Method: MacroEvidence pipeline · yfinance + FRED · 63-session rolling z-scores · not financial advice.

inv_rows.condition: SPX above 7,465 or below 7,278 → Regime flips

regime_analogs.intro: As of June 16, 2026, three closest structural matches for today’s risk-on emerging regime — SPX holding 1.0σ, 10Y near mean, WTI at extreme low. Members search the full 50-year database.

analog_rows.outcome: Regime confirmed pro-risk — SPX extended above 1.5σ within 5 sessions as 10Y stayed suppressed and oil weakness did not spread to equity
Regime confirmed pro-risk — equity absorbed rate and oil weakness, SPX broke above 7,465 equivalent within 4 sessions
Regime invalidated — SPX lost 7,465 equivalent within 6 sessions as 10Y reversed sharply above 0.50σ and equity could not hold

regime_analogs.context_note: Structural pattern matches only — not predictions. SPX holding 1.0σ with 10Y near mean at Z +0.21 and WTI at extreme low Z -2.87 is the defining condition. Resolution at 7,465 and 4.58%. Historical context.
